violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted not properly labeled in the basement chest freezer storage room upright freezer kitchen upright single door coolers.
THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Commercially vacuum packaged fish in the sushi undercounter coolers thawing without removing from or opening the vacuum bag.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of fish was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the chest freezers and various ingredients in the single door upright coolers in the kitchen.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Kitchen reachin cooler interiors not properly maintained.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Sushi refrigerator and basement and storage room upright freezers noted with thermometer not in a conspicuous location.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The kitchen hand washing lavatory noted with no hot water provided.

FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reachin cooler and freezer interior not properly maintained. Prep top cooler 3 door upright cooler interior sushi bar under counter coolers and under counter kitchen freezer have debris build up.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of chicken and beef was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the kitchen prep top cooler.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Shelves and equipment exteriors in the kitchen observed with debris build up on wire shelving and mainly around equipment door handles.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Sushi under counter coolers noted with no thermometer.

SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups and sushi containers noted being stored on the floor in the basement storage area. Spoons and soup containers observed being reused as food scoops for ingredients and in bulk rice bins.
